scripts.docker:platform-base:start: docker rm -f platform-base 2>/dev/null; docker run --name platform-base -p 8080:8080 platform-base
scripts.docker:claude-code:build: pnpm docker:platform-base:build && docker build -t platform-claude-code packages/agents/claude-code
scripts.docker:claude-code:start: docker rm -f platform-claude-code 2>/dev/null; docker run --name platform-claude-code -p 3000:3000 platform-claude-code
scripts.docker:google-workspace:build: pnpm docker:platform-base:build && docker build -t platform-google-workspace-agent packages/agents/google-workspace
scripts.docker:google-workspace:start: docker rm -f platform-google-workspace-agent 2>/dev/null; docker run --name platform-google-workspace-agent -p 3001:8080 platform-google-workspace-agent
